entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The peanut or groundnut (Arachis hypogaea L. Millsp), a globally important grain legume and oilseed crop cultivated in over 100 countries.

entities.name: PEANUT GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the peanut genome, including sequencing, transcriptomes, and analysis.

entities.name: GENOME SEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of determining the complete DNA sequence of the peanut genome.

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOMES
entities.description: The complete set of RNA transcripts produced by the genome.

entities.name: GENOMIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Public and private genomic data and tools available for research.

entities.name: PEANUT BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Programs aimed at improving peanut varieties using genomic information.

entities.name: PLANT GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of plant genomes to enhance crop breeding.

entities.name: CROP BREEDING
entities.description: The process of improving crop traits through selective breeding.

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to sufficient, affordable, and nutritious food.

entities.name: FINANCIAL SECURITY
entities.description: Economic stability and income generation provided by crop cultivation.

entities.name: DIPLOID PROGENITORS
entities.description: The ancestral diploid species from which the tetraploid peanut is derived.

entities.name: GENOMIC VARIATIONS
entities.description: Differences in DNA sequences used as genetic markers.

entities.name: GENETIC MARKERS
entities.description: DNA sequences used to identify specific locations on a chromosome.

entities.name: GENETIC POPULATIONS
entities.description: Groups such as bi- and multiparent populations and germplasm sets used for genetic analysis.

entities.name: MARKER-TRAIT ASSOCIATIONS
entities.description: The link between specific genetic markers and observable traits.

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING PRODUCTS
entities.description: The outcomes of breeding programs that utilize molecular tools.

entities.name: GENOME SEQUENCE
entities.description: The complete nucleotide sequence of the tetraploid cultivated peanut.

entities.name: PEANUT TRAITS
entities.description: The observable characteristics of the peanut plant.
